summary: School Intelligence Drawer feature fully tested. All 14 features verified working correctly. The inline SI panel has been replaced with a compact preview card in the main column, and clicking it opens a right-side expandable drawer containing the full SchoolIntelligencePanel. Drawer slides from right with 250ms animation, has backdrop with blur, closes on X button/ESC/backdrop click. All action buttons (Email Coach, Generate Follow-up, View School Details) close the drawer then trigger their actions.
critical_code_review_comments: SchoolIntelligenceDrawer.js: Well-implemented drawer with proper ESC key handling, backdrop click, and body scroll lock when open
Drawer actions (onEmail, onFollowUp, onNavigateToSchool) correctly close drawer before triggering action
Compact preview card shows score, fit label, summary, and 'View Full Analysis' CTA
JourneyPage.js correctly manages drawer state via siDrawerOpen state variable
Multiple entry points to drawer: compact preview click, school-fit-view-analysis button, ai-school-insight-btn button
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Intelligence Drawer fully tested. Key data-testid selectors: si-compact-preview (compact card), si-drawer (drawer container), si-drawer-close (close button), si-drawer-backdrop (backdrop), si-preview-score, si-preview-label, si-preview-summary, si-preview-cta, school-fit-view-analysis (right panel button), ai-school-insight-btn (AI section button). Inside drawer: si-header, si-breakdown, si-strengths, si-risks, si-opportunity-timing, si-coach-signals, si-recommended-strategy, si-actions, si-email-coach-btn, si-followup-btn, si-view-details-btn.

drawer_feature_tests: TEST 1: Compact SI preview card renders with score (75), fit label (Strong Fit), summary, and CTA - PASS
TEST 2: Clicking compact preview opens drawer (transform: matrix(1,0,0,1,0,0)) - PASS
TEST 3: Drawer contains all SI panel sections: header, breakdown, strengths, risks, opportunity-timing, coach-signals, recommended-strategy, actions - PASS
TEST 4: Drawer close button (data-testid='si-drawer-close') closes drawer - PASS
TEST 5: Backdrop click (data-testid='si-drawer-backdrop') closes drawer - PASS
TEST 6: ESC key closes drawer - PASS
TEST 7: School Fit 'View full analysis' button (data-testid='school-fit-view-analysis') opens drawer - PASS
TEST 8: AI Assist 'Explore School Intelligence' button (data-testid='ai-school-insight-btn') opens drawer - PASS
TEST 9: Email Coach button in drawer opens email composer and closes drawer - PASS
TEST 10: Generate Follow-up button in drawer opens scheduler and closes drawer - PASS
TEST 11: Main page is cleaner - Timeline and Coach Watch are primary focus - PASS
TEST 12: No console errors on page load or drawer interaction - PASS
TEST 13: Coach Watch card still renders correctly in right panel - PASS
TEST 14: Floating action bar (Email, Log, Replied, Follow-up) still works - PASS
